notes.ca_surcharge: AnazaoHealth adds $2.00/vial for California shipments from their 503B facility. All AnazaoHealth prices below INCLUDE this surcharge.
notes.cost_per_ml: Pre-calculated for easy recipe costing. Divide unit_cost by volume.
notes.bac_water_note: Bacteriostatic water is used to reconstitute lyophilized peptide vials. Cost per reconstitution is negligible (~$0.07–$0.14).
notes.iv_hardware_bundle: Standard IV session hardware = saline_1000ml + iv_catheter_22g + iv_set_basic + needle_18g_draw + misc_disposables. Total ~$12.15 per IV session.

suppliers.anazao: AnazaoHealth — FDA 503B Outsourcing Facility, Las Vegas NV. 800.995.4363
suppliers.ths: Total Health Supply LLC — Irvine, CA. 657.495.3625 / amanda.moradian@totalhealth.supply

suppliers.ald: Advanced Light Devices, LLC — 5365 Kevin Way, Las Vegas NV 89149. 702.485.4135 / Gene@aldmed.com / aldmed.com

supplies.name: ß-NAD+ 125mg/mL, 4mL SDV
supplies.notes: IV, IM, SQ. $99 list + $2 CA surcharge. Primary source for IV NAD+ sessions.

supplies.name: Ascorbic Acid (PF/Non-Corn) 500mg/mL, 10mL SDV
supplies.notes: $14.69 + $2 CA surcharge. PF single-dose. Use for smaller Vit C doses.

supplies.name: Ascorbic Acid (Preserved/Non-Corn) 500mg/mL, 30mL MDV
supplies.notes: $41.99 + $2 CA surcharge. Multi-dose. More economical for high-dose Vit C (25g, 50g, 75g).

supplies.name: Glutathione (PF) 200mg/mL, 10mL SDV
supplies.notes: $22.93 + $2 CA. PF single-dose. Use for push glutathione or smaller doses.

supplies.name: Glutathione (Preserved) 200mg/mL, 30mL MDV
supplies.notes: $45 + $2 CA. Multi-dose preserved. Most economical for IV glutathione sessions.

supplies.name: PlenishIV Nutrient Cocktail, 50mL SDV
supplies.notes: $45 + $2 CA. Myers-style nutrient cocktail. Base for standard IV formulas.

supplies.name: M.I.C. (Methionine/Inositol/Choline) 30mL MDV
supplies.notes: $28.67 + $2 CA. IM injection. Base lipotropic for standard injections.

supplies.name: M.I.C./Vitamin B12 (Cyanocobalamin) 30mL MDV
supplies.notes: $51.60 + $2 CA. MIC-B12 Skinny Shot. Maps to premium injection (Skinny Shot variant).

supplies.name: Methylcobalamin (B12) 5000mcg/mL, 10mL MDV
supplies.notes: $45.86 + $2 CA. Standard B12 injection source. ~100 injections at 0.1mL each.

supplies.name: Testosterone Cypionate (Grapeseed Oil) 200mg/mL, 10mL MDV
supplies.notes: $37.42 + $2 CA. IM/SQ. 10mL vial = 2000mg total. Primary HRT medication.

supplies.name: Testosterone Cypionate (Grapeseed Oil) 200mg/mL, 30mL MDV
supplies.notes: $108.06 + $2 CA. More economical per dose for high-volume HRT patients.

supplies.name: Olympia Vita-Complex Injection 30mL Vial
supplies.composition: B1 (Thiamine HCl) 100mg/mL, B3 (Niacinamide) 100mg/mL, B2 (Riboflavin-5-P) 2mg/mL, B6 (Pyridoxine HCl) 2mg/mL, B5 (Dexpanthenol) 2mg/mL
supplies.notes: IV/IM/SQ. Non-cold. Confirmed $124/vial from THS Invoice 3349. Standard component for Energy, Range, and Muscle Recovery IVs.

supplies.name: Vitamin D3 (Cholecalciferol) 50,000 IU/mL, 30mL Vial
supplies.notes: IM only. Non-cold. Confirmed $101/vial. Typical IM dose = 1mL (50,000 IU) = $3.37 drug cost.

supplies.name: Olympia L-Carnitine Injection 500mg/mL, 30mL Vial
supplies.notes: IM/IV. Non-cold. Confirmed $105/vial from THS Invoice 3349. Photo confirms Olympia brand on shelf. Premium injection component. Typical IM dose = 2mL (1g) = $7.00 drug cost.

supplies.name: MIC (Methionine/Inositol/Choline) Injection 25/50/50 mg/mL, 30mL MDV
supplies.notes: THS/Olympia version — price not found in any THS invoice on file. NDC 72682-6420-1 confirmed from shelf photo. FOR COGS USE: see mic-anazao-30ml ($30.67, $1.022/mL) as confirmed fallback until THS invoice obtained. THS likely cheaper.

supplies.name: AminoMultiPlex™ Preserved Injection 30mL MDV
supplies.composition: Arginine HCl 50mg/mL, Glutamine 15mg/mL, Lysine HCl 15mg/mL, Proline 25mg/mL
supplies.notes: $46.50 + $2 CA surcharge = $48.50. Also available as PF SDV at $49.99+$2=$51.99. IM/IV amino acid blend. Component for Energy & Vitality / amino-boost IV protocols. THS/Olympia version also exists but no THS invoice price found — using Anazao as confirmed source.

supplies.name: Methylcobalamin (B12) THS/Olympia 10,000 mcg/mL, 30mL Vial — UNPRICED
supplies.notes: THS/Olympia version not found in any THS invoice on file. FOR IV USE: see methylcobalamin-anazao-10ml instead (5,000mcg/mL, $4.786/mL, confirmed from Anazao price list). THS version would likely be cheaper — request invoice if switching supplier.

supplies.name: Mineral Blend (Mg/Zn/Mn/Cu) 30mL Vial
supplies.concentration: 80/1/20/0.2 mg/mL (Mg Chlor / Zn Sulf / Manganese / Cu Gluco)
supplies.notes: Non-cold. Mineral complex for IV therapy add-in.

supplies.name: NAC IV (Acetylcysteine) 200mg/mL, 30mL Vial
supplies.notes: Preserved. IV/IM. Detox & cellular repair formula component.

supplies.name: Tri-Immune (Glutathione/Ascorbic Acid/Zinc Sulfate) 30mL Vial
supplies.notes: Immune defense IV component. Contains Glutathione + Vit C + Zinc per mL.

supplies.name: Zinc Sulfate 10mg/mL, 10mL Vial
supplies.notes: Non-cold. Standalone zinc for IV add-on.

supplies.name: Sodium Chloride 0.9% PF, 1000mL Bag
supplies.notes: BBR E8000. Primary IV bag for all standard and specialty IV sessions.

supplies.name: Sodium Chloride 0.9%, 500mL Bag
supplies.notes: BBR Q8001. Use for shorter infusions or pediatric/fluid-sensitive protocols.

supplies.name: Isolyte S pH 7.4 (Na/K/Mg/Cl/Phosphate/Acetate/Gluconate), 1000mL
supplies.notes: BBR L7070. Balanced electrolyte solution. More economical than plain saline.

supplies.name: Bacteriostatic Water for Injection, 30mL MDV
supplies.notes: SF BACSW30. Used to reconstitute lyophilized peptide vials. ~$0.07/mL.

supplies.name: Bacteriostatic Water (Pharma Grade) 30mL MDV — 25 vial box
supplies.notes: PFI 00409-3977-03. $100/25 vials = $4/vial. Pharmaceutical grade.

supplies.name: IV Catheter 22G x 1", Autoguard Safety (50/box)
supplies.notes: BD 382523. $136.77/50 = $2.735/catheter. Required for every IV session.

supplies.name: Syringe 3cc Luer Lock (100/box)
supplies.notes: EXE 26200. ~$13.26-14.25/100 = ~$0.133. Used for drawing IV additives.

supplies.name: Insulin Syringe 1cc Luer Lock (100/box)
supplies.notes: MHC 802015. ~$23.50/100. Standard injection syringe.

supplies.name: Insulin Syringe 0.3mL 31G x 5/16" (100/box)
supplies.notes: MHC 831365. $18.40/100. For small-volume subcutaneous injections (peptides).

supplies.name: Hypodermic Needle 18G x 1" (100/box)
supplies.notes: EXE 26419. $8.79/100. Drawing needle for IV preparation.

supplies.name: Hypodermic Needle 25G x 1.5" (100/box)
supplies.notes: EXE 26406. $6.40/100. Standard IM injection needle.

supplies.name: Hypodermic Needle 25G x 1" (100/box)
supplies.notes: EXE 26405. $7.62/100. IM injection needle.

supplies.name: Hypodermic Needle 25G x 5/8" (100/box)
supplies.notes: EXE 26403. $7.62/100. Shorter IM/SQ needle.

supplies.name: Hypodermic Needle 30G x 1" (100/box)
supplies.notes: EXE 26439. $9.50/100. Fine gauge for sensitive injection sites.

supplies.name: Hypodermic Needle 30G x 1/2" (100/box)
supplies.notes: EXE 26437. $8.23/100. SQ injection needle — peptides, GLP-1.

supplies.name: IV Set Basic Vented 20 drops/mL (50/case)
supplies.notes: McGuff 008269. $139.23/50 = $2.785/set. Required for every IV drip session.

supplies.name: Magnesium Chloride 200mg/mL, 50mL MDV (10/tray)
supplies.notes: McGuff 010150. $339.92/10 = $33.99/vial. IV magnesium add-on or MB combo component.

supplies.name: NAD+ 1000mg Vial
supplies.notes: Lyophilized. Reconstitute with bac water. Used for IM NAD+ injections. Compare: AnazaoHealth at $0.202/mg for IV-grade.

supplies.name: BPC-157 / TB-4 Blend 10mg/10mg Vial

supplies.name: CJC-1295 / Ipamorelin 2X Blend 5mg/5mg Vial
supplies.notes: Lyophilized. 5mg each. ~1 vial per monthly phase at standard dosing.

supplies.name: 3X Peptide Blend Vial

supplies.name: KPV / BPC-157 / TB-4 / MGF Blend Vial

supplies.name: GHK-Cu 50mg Vial
supplies.notes: Lyophilized. 1 vial = 30-day protocol.

supplies.name: MOTS-C 10mg Vial
supplies.notes: Lyophilized. Typical dosing: 5-10mg/week.

supplies.name: Tirzepatide 40mg Vial
supplies.notes: GLP-1/GIP agonist. Vial split across monthly doses based on tier.

supplies.name: Retatrutide 20mg Vial

supplies.name: Ascor® (Ascorbic Acid Injection USP) 500mg/mL, 50mL PBP Vial
supplies.notes: $750/tray of 25 = $30/vial. PBP = Preservative-free, Buffered, pH-adjusted. Pharmaceutical USP grade. $1.20/g vs AnazaoHealth at $2.93/g — 59% cheaper. PRIMARY source for all high-dose Vit C IVs.

supplies.name: Dispensing Pin, Vial Adapter, SwanLock® Needleless w/ Air Filter (50/case)
supplies.notes: $117/50 = $2.34/pin. Used to access 50mL Ascor® vials. One pin per vial per session. Include in Vit C IV COGS.

supplies.name: 12" IV Extension Set, 0.2µm Filter, Slide Clamp, Luer Lock, DEHP-free (each)
supplies.notes: Provided free with Ascor® tray order (Invoice 1074504-IN). 0.2µm in-line filter — used for high-dose Vit C infusion. Confirm cost on reorder; currently $0 on this invoice.

supplies.name: Methylene Blue Sterile 10mL, 0.2um Filtered
supplies.notes: Confirmed from ALD Invoice #4443: 5 vials × $85 + $8.30 shipping. Session dose confirmed 5mg. Concentration NOT stated on invoice — assumed 10mg/mL (1% solution, standard for compounded MB IV). If concentration is different, recalculate: sessions_per_vial = total_mg / 5, cost_per_session = $86.66 / sessions_per_vial.

supplies.name: Provayblue® (Methylene Blue USP) 50mg/mL, 10mL SDV
supplies.notes: $1,857.99 / 5 ampules = $371.60/ampule. IV-grade pharmaceutical MB (USP). Requires light-protected UV tubing (UV004) for infusion. MUST confirm session dose with provider to set final COGS.

supplies.name: Cyanocobalamin (B12) 1000mcg/mL, 30mL MDV
supplies.notes: Standard injection B12 (cyano form). 30mL MDV. Typical IM dose = 1mL = $0.87 in drug cost.

supplies.name: Hydroxocobalamin 1000mcg/mL, 30mL MDV
supplies.notes: Hydroxo form of B12 — preferred by some protocols for longer retention. $1.40/mL vs cyano at $0.87/mL.

supplies.name: Vitamin B-Complex 30mL MDV
supplies.notes: Ship on Ice. Multi-B injectable (B1/B2/B3/B5/B6). Expensive at $10.53/mL. Confirm ml-per-injection for COGS calc.

supplies.name: Magnesium Sulfate 50% (500mg/mL), 10mL SDV
supplies.notes: 50% MgSO4. Very cost-effective: $1.30/g. Dilute before IV use. Preferred source for mag component in combos.

supplies.name: Magnesium Chloride (Chloromag) 200mg/mL, 50mL MDV
supplies.notes: Alternative to McGuff MgCl2 ($33.99/vial, $0.68/mL). Merit = $0.54/mL — 21% cheaper.

supplies.name: Medigrative® IV Catheter 22G x 3/4" (50/box)
supplies.notes: $65/50 = $1.30/ea. Non-safety catheter. Less than half the cost of BD Autoguard ($2.735). Confirm clinical preference before switching.

supplies.name: Medigrative® IV Catheter 24G x 3/4" (50/box)
supplies.notes: $65/50 = $1.30/ea. Smaller gauge option for difficult stick patients.

supplies.name: Medigrative® IV Tubing M001, 15 Micron Filter, 15 Drop (50/box)
supplies.notes: $60/50 = $1.20/ea. 15-micron filter. Less than half the cost of McGuff basic IV set ($2.785).

supplies.name: Medigrative® IV Tubing UV004 — Light Safe, Needleless, 15 Micron (50/box)
supplies.notes: $235/50 = $4.70/ea. UV-light-protective tubing. REQUIRED for Methylene Blue IV infusions. Premium of $3.50/session vs standard tubing.

supplies.name: Alcohol Prep Pads Medium (200/box)
supplies.notes: $2.99/200 = $0.015/pad. Cheaper than THS estimate used in bundles.

supplies.name: Dexamethasone 4mg/mL (120mg/30mL), 30mL MDV
supplies.notes: Anti-inflammatory steroid. Component of some specialty IV protocols or post-procedure.

supplies.name: Sodium Chloride 0.9%, 500mL Bag (24/case)
supplies.notes: $102.85/24 = $4.29/bag. 500mL bag — comparable to THS 500mL at $4.20.

supplies.name: Methylene Blue 25mg Oral Capsules (60 caps/bottle)
supplies.notes: SF METHBLU-25MG-CD. ORAL only — not for IV use. 60 caps/bottle.

supplies.name: [Bundle] Standard IV Session Hardware
supplies.notes: Base hardware cost for any IV drip session. Add active ingredients on top.

supplies.name: [Bundle] Standard Injection Hardware
supplies.notes: Base hardware cost per IM injection. Swap syringe/needle size as needed.

supplies.name: [Bundle] Methylene Blue IV Session Hardware (UV-Protected)
supplies.notes: UV-protective tubing (UV004) required for MB — blocks light degradation of methylene blue. $1.92 more per session than standard IV bundle.

supplies.name: [Bundle] SQ Injection Hardware (peptides/GLP-1)
supplies.notes: SQ injection hardware. Used for peptide and GLP-1 self-injection kits.
